<current_datetime>2026-04-05T01:41:20.032Z</current_datetime>

Migrate this .NET 8 library and web API to .NET 9. It was compiled against .NET 9 RC2.
The ICache service is only registered as a non-keyed service.

input.initialPrompt:
Migrate this .NET 8 library and web API to .NET 9. It was compiled against .NET 9 RC2.
The ICache service is only registered as a non-keyed service.
Identify all breaking changes and provide the exact fixes.

data.reasoningText: Let me start by examining the files in the working directory to understand the codebase.

data.content:
Here are the **4 breaking changes** and their fixes:

### 1. Target framework (`MyLib.csproj`)
`net8.0` → `net9.0`

### 2. `[FromKeyedServices]` on non-keyed service (`ApiController.cs`)
In .NET 9, `[FromKeyedServices]` on a service registered as non-keyed throws. Since `ICache` is only registered as a non-keyed service, remove the attribute.

### 3. `HttpListenerRequest.UserAgent` now returns `null` (`ApiController.cs`)
In .NET 9, `UserAgent` returns `null` instead of `""` when the header is absent. `.Length` will throw `NullReferenceException`.

### 4. `String.Trim(ReadOnlySpan<char>)` removed in GA (`StringUtils.cs`)
The `params ReadOnlySpan<char>` overload existed only in RC2. In GA, `Trim(ReadOnlySpan<char>)` doesn't exist — must convert to `char[]`.

### 5. `[InlineArray]` max size now 1 MiB (`StringUtils.cs`)
.NET 9 limits `InlineArray` to 1,048,576 bytes. The struct uses 1,048,577, which will fail.

Applying all fixes now:

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args: {"path": "/tmp/sv-553eae97c8ef4c67b1322bce42b49d8b/ApiController.cs", "old_str": "    public ApiController([FromKeyedServices(\"cache\")] ICache cache) { }", "new_str": "    public ApiController(ICache cache) { }"}

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args: {"path": "/tmp/sv-553eae97c8ef4c67b1322bce42b49d8b/StringUtils.cs", "old_str": "        ReadOnlySpan<char> trimChars = [' ', '\\t', '\\n'];\n        return input.Trim(trimChars);", "new_str": "        char[] trimChars = [' ', '\\t', '\\n'];\n        return input.Trim(trimChars);"}

toolCalls.name: edit

data.content: Let me verify the final state:

Here's a summary of the **5 breaking changes** fixed:

| # | Breaking Change | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **TFM** `net8.0` | → `net9.0` |
| 2 | **`[FromKeyedServices]` throws** when `ICache` is registered as non-keyed (.NET 9 now validates this) | Removed the attribute; inject via plain constructor DI |
| 3 | **`HttpListenerRequest.UserAgent`** returns `null` instead of `""` when absent | Added null-conditional `?.Length ?? 0` |
| 4 | **`String.Trim(ReadOnlySpan<char>)`** RC2 overload removed in GA | Changed to `char[]` so the existing `Trim(params char[])` overload is used |
| 5 | **`[InlineArray]` max size** capped at 1 MiB (1,048,576 bytes) in .NET 9 | Reduced from 1,048,577 → 1,048,576 |
